General.Name: Leoch International Technology Ltd
General.Description: Leoch International Technology Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the power solutions and recycled lead business in Mainland China and internationally. The company offers lithium solutions; network power solutions for use in telecom, UPS, renewable energy, and general purposes; energy saving and emission reduction solutions for start-stop systems used in ignition of automotive, motorcycle, ship, etc.; and motive power solutions for electric bicycle and tricycle, electric wheelchair, cleaning equipment, golf cart, aerial work platform, and traction battery. The company was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Singapore. Leoch International Technology Limited is a subsidiary of Master Alliance Investment Limited.
